category_sources: Official GraalVM docs at https://www.graalvm.org/latest/docs/ cover GraalVM, Native Image, Graal Compiler, and language runtimes.
source_facts.description: "JDK distribution with Graal compiler and Native Image".
display_name_sources: Official documentation page is titled GraalVM Documentation: https://www.graalvm.org/latest/docs/.
Official repository README uses GraalVM branding: https://github.com/oracle/graal.
docs_sources: Official GraalVM site hosts the latest documentation at https://www.graalvm.org/latest/docs/.
Official repository README directs users to the GraalVM website for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/oracle/graal; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GraalVM docs list Native Image, Graal Compiler, and Graal language runtime documentation.
source_facts.description identifies JDK, Graal compiler, and Native Image.
